query:
CREATE TABLE `availability` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`dayOfWeek` int NOT NULL,
	`startTime` varchar(8) NOT NULL,
	`endTime` varchar(8) NOT NULL,
	`isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`timezone` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'America/Los_Angeles',
	CONSTRAINT `availability_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `blockedDates` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`date` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
	`reason` varchar(256),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `blockedDates_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `bookings` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`callTypeId` int NOT NULL,
	`leadId` int,
	`firstName` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`lastName` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
	`phone` varchar(32),
	`company` varchar(256),
	`message` text,
	`scheduledDate` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
	`scheduledTime` varchar(8) NOT NULL,
	`timezone` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'America/Los_Angeles',
	`status` enum('pending','confirmed','cancelled','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`confirmationToken` varchar(128),
	`adminNotes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `bookings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `callTypes` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`durationMinutes` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
	`price` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`currency` varchar(8) DEFAULT 'USD',
	`isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`color` varchar(32) DEFAULT '#6366f1',
	`sortOrder` int DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `callTypes_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `callTypes_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);

CREATE TABLE `emailCaptures` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
	`firstName` varchar(128),
	`source` varchar(128) DEFAULT 'book_download',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `emailCaptures_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `interactions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`leadId` int NOT NULL,
	`type` enum('note','email','call','meeting','booking','stage_change','system') NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
	`body` text,
	`metadata` json,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `interactions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `leads` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`firstName` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`lastName` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
	`phone` varchar(32),
	`company` varchar(256),
	`jobTitle` varchar(256),
	`website` varchar(512),
	`linkedIn` varchar(512),
	`stage` enum('new_lead','contacted','qualified','proposal_sent','closed_won','closed_lost') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new_lead',
	`source` enum('website_contact','book_download','booking','referral','linkedin','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'website_contact',
	`dealValue` decimal(12,2),
	`offerInterest` enum('sprint','advisory','both','unknown') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unknown',
	`notes` text,
	`tags` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`isArchived` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`lastContactedAt` timestamp,
	CONSTRAINT `leads_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
